llmResponse.agenda_changes: No agenda changes announced. Items proceeded in order with some items combined (consent items approved as bundle).
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: If there are no questions, can I please get a motion to approve? Make a motion to approve. I'll second. All those in favor? Aye.

items.intro_words: Good evening, everyone at seven o'. Clock. And welcome to another red City school district
Roll call, please, I believe. Trustee Weekly. Absent. Trustee McAvoy.
Item 4.2 reported on closed session from October 11, 2023. There is no report out.
Are there any changes to the agenda? Okay. Thank you. And with that,
And with that, can I get a motion to approve? Make a motion to approve a second.
And do we have any oral communication? No oral communication. Thank you.
So moving on to item nine, bond program consent items. If there are no questions,
Moving on to item 11. School community reports. 11.1 is a Redwood City Together board presentation.
So, moving on to Our next item, 11.2 Mental Health Board presentation. Yes.
Moving on to item 11.3 report regarding baseline data for iready diagnostic exam results.
So moving on to. Yeah, it's nine o'. Clock. Okay, let's go ahead and take a five minute break.
moving on to discussion items 12.1 is recommendation to convene board study session to update the board
So moving to item 12.2 is first reading and discussion of board policy 5141.66, school health services.
Moving on to 12.2. First reading and discussion of board policy. Oops, sorry. 12.3 first reading and discussion of board policy.
Moving on to 12.4. First reading and discussion of board policy. 5,141.5 mental health.
Moving on to 12.5, first reading and discussion of board policy 6177, summer learning.
Moving on to consent items. If there are no questions, can I please get a motion to approve?
Moving on to item 15, board and superintendent's report. Who would like to go first?
Moving to item 16, information. 16.1 is information on the San Mateo County Investment fund.
So moving on to correspondence. So we got an email from a community member with questions
And then 18.1 possible other business suggested items for future agendas. November 2nd.
And then moving on to 19.1. Are there any changes to the board calendar?
So moving on to 20. It's 9:50. Who would like to make a motion to adjourn?
